title: handle_move creates a second reqwest Client instead of reusing FederationClient
description: inbox.rs lines 1431-1436: handle_move() creates a new reqwest::Client::builder() to re-fetch the actor document for alsoKnownAs verification, instead of using the already-available FederationClient. What goes wrong: (1) bypasses validate_outbound_url SSRF check since it hits the URL directly, (2) duplicates timeout/TLS config which can drift from the canonical client, (3) does not follow the redirect policy (none) that FederationClient enforces. The fix is to expose a raw-JSON fetch method on FederationClient.
